nasb.text: Then you will know that I, the Lord, have heard all your revilings which you have spoken against the mountains of Israel saying, ‘They are laid desolate; they are given to us for food.’

esv.text: And you shall know that I am the Lord. “I have heard all the revilings that you uttered against the mountains of Israel, saying, ‘They are laid desolate; they are given us to devour.’

cnv.text: 這樣，你就必知道我耶和華聽見了你的一切毀謗，就是你攻擊以色列眾山的話，說：“這些山都已經荒涼了！已經給我們吞吃了！”

ccb.text: 那时，你必知道我耶和华听见了你毁谤以色列山岭的一切话，你说，这些山岭荒废了，归我们所有了。
